title: deutzia × hybrida
intro: Deutzia × hybrida, also known as the hybrid deutzia, is a type of flowering shrub that belongs to the Hydrangeaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of deutzia × hybrida include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of deutzia × hybrida include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be made from the leaves, flowers, and roots of the plant.
